stem: Marcus deposits $40 in a savings account at the end of each week. At the beginning of the 1st week of a year there was $750 in that savings account. How much money, in dollars, will be in the account at the end of the 5th week of that year?
rationale: Choice B is correct. After 5 weeks, 5 deposits of 40 have been added: 750 + 5(40) = 950.
